news.title: ChatGPT did not cure a dog’s cancer
news.summary: When an Australian tech entrepreneur with no background in biology or medicine said ChatGPT helped save his dog from cancer, the story couldn't help but spread. It's the kind of validation Big Tech has long craved: proof that AI will revolutionize medicine and take on one of its deadliest diseases.
